stemHtml: Refer to figure or E(LO)-3 chart from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. A flight with MRJT is planned from Glasgow to Valencia. Part of the route is along A34/UN85934, from SITET (50º06'N, 000°00'E/W) to L'AIGLE VOR (LGL, 48°47'N, 000°32'E). The TAS is 382 kt and the W/V is 110º(M)/30 kt. Calculate the flight time for this portion of the flight.
